'''Alexi Garyn's yacht''' was the escape vessel [[Alexi Garyn]] failed to reach when he attempted to flee [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] on [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]].

{{Veh-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Darth Maul (2000) 4|''Darth Maul'' (2000) 4]] {{1st}}
